# Dogfood demo proof loop restore: Pinax content snapshot → apply → restore one file.
# Restore uses the CLI-authored local snapshot id, so Git can stay metadata-only.

prepare-demo-vault vault
seed-demo-git-baseline vault
capture-demo-baseline vault baseline

exec sh -c 'pinax repair plan --save --vault vault --json > repair_plan.json'
validate-json-envelope repair_plan.json
validate-clean-stdout repair_plan.json
assert-demo-plan repair_plan.json

exec sh -c 'pinax version snapshot --vault vault --message "dogfood demo pre-restore apply" --json > snapshot.json'
validate-json-envelope snapshot.json
validate-clean-stdout snapshot.json
grep '"status":"success"' snapshot.json

exec sh -c 'plan=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open(\"repair_plan.json\"))[\"facts\"][\"plan_id\"])"); pinax repair apply --plan "$plan" --yes --vault vault --json > repair_apply.json'
validate-json-envelope repair_apply.json
validate-clean-stdout repair_apply.json
assert-demo-apply repair_apply.json
assert-demo-metadata-patched baseline/notes/research/meeting-2026.md vault/notes/research/meeting-2026.md

exec sh -c 'rev=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open(\"snapshot.json\"))[\"facts\"][\"snapshot_id\"])"); pinax version restore notes/research/meeting-2026.md --revision "$rev" --plan --vault vault --json > restore_plan.json'
validate-json-envelope restore_plan.json
validate-clean-stdout restore_plan.json
grep '"command":"version.restore"' restore_plan.json
grep '"plan_id"' restore_plan.json
assert-demo-restore-plan restore_plan.json

exec sh -c 'plan=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open(\"restore_plan.json\"))[\"facts\"][\"plan_id\"])"); pinax version restore apply --vault vault --plan "$plan" --yes --json > restore_apply.json'
validate-json-envelope restore_apply.json
validate-clean-stdout restore_apply.json
grep '"command":"version.restore.apply"' restore_apply.json
grep '"status":"success"' restore_apply.json
assert-demo-restore-apply restore_apply.json
assert-file-equals baseline/notes/research/meeting-2026.md vault/notes/research/meeting-2026.md
